summary: InvitationPage.js refactoring verification complete. The monolithic 1419-line component was successfully decomposed into 10 sub-components + 1 orchestrator (~576 lines). All components import correctly, frontend compiles without errors, and all data-testid attributes are preserved. Backend API endpoints respond correctly. No regression detected on signin/dashboard pages.

issues: PRE-EXISTING BUG: 'body stream already read' error message displayed instead of proper API error message - this is NOT introduced by the refactoring

backend_api_tests: ✅ GET /api/invitations/:token returns 404 for invalid token with proper error message
frontend_refactoring_tests: ✅ InvitationPage.js orchestrator imports all 10 sub-components correctly
✅ InvitationStatusBadge.js renders with all status badge data-testids
✅ InvitationAppointmentDetails.js has appointment-title, appointment-date, appointment-location data-testids
✅ InvitationResponseSection.js has accept-btn, decline-btn, cancel-participation-btn data-testids
✅ InvitationCheckinSection.js has checkin-section and all checkin-related data-testids
✅ QRDisplayModal.js has qr-display-modal and related data-testids
frontend_compilation_tests: ✅ Webpack compiles successfully (only warnings from third-party html5-qrcode library)
✅ ESLint passes with no errors on all invitation components
✅ All 51 data-testid attributes preserved in refactored components
regression_tests: ✅ Landing page loads correctly with NLYT branding
✅ Signin page loads and accepts credentials
✅ InvitationPage error state renders correctly with data-testid='invitation-error'

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring follows good separation of concerns - each sub-component handles a specific UI section
All data-testid attributes properly preserved for testing
API_URL correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in both orchestrator and InvitationResponseSection
State management properly centralized in orchestrator with props passed to sub-components

PRE-EXISTING BUG: 'body stream already read' error in fetchInvitation - response.text() is called but then JSON.parse is attempted on the same text, which works but the error message shown to user is the JavaScript error rather than the API error message
seed_data_creation: None - tested with invalid tokens to verify error handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: InvitationPage.js refactoring verified. The 1419-line monolithic component was split into 10 sub-components: InvitationStatusBadge, AppointmentUnavailableCard, InvitationCardHeader, GuaranteeRevalidationBanner, InvitationAppointmentDetails, ModificationProposalSection, EngagementRulesCard, InvitationResponseSection, InvitationCheckinSection, QRDisplayModal. All 51 data-testid attributes preserved. The 'body stream already read' error in error display is a PRE-EXISTING bug, not introduced by this refactoring.
